subject: Re: Simona to new york
body:
ok

----- Original Message ----
From: "danars07@aol.com" <danars07@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Wednesday, December 13, 2006 1:14:19 PM
Subject: Simona to new york


 Hello,


  I spoke to Simona to confirm the flight dates and I found a
ticket for $1769. She would be arriving Friday Dec. 29 at 7:30p and
leaving Saturday the 6th at 11am. Is this ok?


 I can't tell you how excited I am to see her...I miss her so much. 





Dana B
